description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a predominantly white upper and a thick, textured sole. The shoe features a lace-up closure with white laces and a padded collar for comfort. The heel and portions of the outsole are accented with a soft peach color, adding a subtle contrast to the otherwise monochromatic design. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated textile, with visible stitching and paneling for structure. The sole is robust and ribbed, likely made of rubber, providing grip and durability for urban environments. The interior is lightly padded, and the overall construction suggests a focus on both style and everyday comfort.
description: A white low-top sneaker with peach accents, lace-up closure, and a thick ribbed sole, designed for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white upper, peach heel accent, and thick ribbed sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the peach heel tab and padded collar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the shoe and the peach accent on the heel and sole.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, lacing, and the ribbed texture of the sole.
